description.p: CodexBar KDE displays subscription usage from the host-side CodexBar CLI in a native Qt dashboard and system tray.

ul.li: Harden authentication, reset redemption, privacy, history, and subprocess lifecycle.
Add reproducible glibc 2.28 AppImage builds with Python 3.10–3.14 CI coverage.
Add licensing notices, corresponding-source references, and an SPDX package SBOM.
